user.title: Set up LG Portable AC
user.description: Select the IR transmitter pointed at your LG portable air conditioner.

data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared transmitter entity to use for sending commands.

abort.no_infrared_entities: No infrared transmitters found. Please set up an IR emitter (e.g., ESPHome IR proxy) first.
abort.already_configured: This emitter is already configured for an LG Portable AC.
